data.content: Plan needs revision before implementation. The central requirement is to feed prompt rendering from resolved runtime step metadata, but the plan keeps build_prompt_params() reading directly from profile.outputs and calls that already sufficient. Please revise the plan so prompt/body rendering and claim rendering paths take StepMetadata.output (or an equivalent resolved runtime value) rather than re-deriving output from the profile map. Also include shipment_review.md in scope, because it currently contains output-specific guidance and would remain inconsistent otherwise. Finally, align the target names used in prompt conditionals with the canonical vocabulary chosen for c8f4; the current plan mixes commit with the parent requirement's merged_main_commit wording.
